infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Arbiter listens for voice commands so you can speak to the system hands-free.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Arbiter transcribes your voice on-device to dispatch commands to the operator dashboard.

plugins.microphonePermission: Arbiter listens for voice commands so you can speak to the system hands-free.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Arbiter transcribes your voice on-device to dispatch commands to the operator dashboard.
